ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region within the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the country */,
  "net_migration" REAL /* Net migration rate */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth (total years) */,
  "urban_population" REAL /* Urban population percentage of total population */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate per 1,000 population */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate per 1,000 population */,
  "fertility_rate" REAL /* Total fertility rate (average number of children per woman) */,
  "male_population" REAL /* Percentage of male population */,
  "female_population" REAL /* Percentage of female population */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_data" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for GDP data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita (current US$) */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate */,
  "gdp_total" REAL /* Total GDP (current US$) */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electricity_access" (
  "electricity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for electricity access data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the country */,
  "access_to_electricity" REAL /* Percentage of population with access to electricity */,
  "rural_access" REAL /* Percentage of rural population with access to electricity */,
  "urban_access" REAL /* Percentage of urban population with access to electricity */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("electricity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electricity_access_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-region */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-region */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the associated region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the sub-region */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Total area of the sub-region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subregions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_trends" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration trend entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Migration rate for the year */,
  "in_migration" REAL /* Net in-migration rate */,
  "out_migration" REAL /* Net out-migration rate */,
  "total_migration" REAL /* Total migration rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_expectancy_trends" (
  "life_expectancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life expectancy entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy for the year */,
  "male_life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy for males */,
  "female_life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy for females */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("life_expectancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancy_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urbanization_trends" (
  "urbanization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urbanization trend entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "urban_population" REAL /* Urban population percentage for the year */,
  "rural_population" REAL /* Rural population percentage for the year */,
  "urban_population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of urban population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("urbanization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urbanization_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object representing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the country data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed action performed (e.g., view, download, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the user who generated the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for metadata */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
